scenes.title: The Problem
scenes.notes: Show cluttered desktop with FCP, Compressor, Motion all open simultaneously. Voice-over: 'Eight apps. One workflow. Zero coordination — until now.'

scenes.title: Final Cut Pro
scenes.notes: Demo fcp_fcpxml_build assembling a timeline from a JSON spec in under a second. Show the spec on the left, the FCP timeline on the right.

scenes.title: OZML Edits
scenes.notes: Show motion_template_set_param updating live title text inside .motn files with no GUI. The parameter changes in real time in the Motion canvas.

scenes.title: Compressor Pipeline
scenes.notes: compressor_encode submitting a ProRes batch job, compressor_monitor_stream showing live progress bars updating in the terminal.

scenes.title: Pixelmator Pro
scenes.notes: pixelmator_compose_brand_card generating social cards from a Pixelmator template at three aspect ratios: 16:9, 1:1, 9:16. All in one call.

scenes.title: The Protocol
scenes.notes: csos_protocol_run tying all 8 apps together in sequence — brand cards, Motion title, FCPXML build, FCP import, Compressor encode — one command, twelve steps.
